data.body: Cheap-re-sign for 5147 implemented (subagent): NEW rebar sign-review <id> (+library resign_plan_review + MCP sign_review) reads REVIEW_RESULT sidecar and re-signs ONLY if material_fingerprint still matches current (never a drifted verdict); no LLM/network. 4 tests, mutation-proven staleness guard (invert !=/== -> both resign tests RED). Pushed Gerrit 521 (ref 5147). All 5 remaining changes (509 515 517 518 521) now ON-TIP (998cb442) CI-ing. Next: submit each green-on-tip; close 5147 after 521 merges (will then have exit-11+lock-retry+cheap-resign). Still pending: #1(509) #9(515) #6(517) #8(518) #3-close(5147 via 521) 3b4e(delete/init tests).
